allocated_storage.description: The amount of storage (in gigabytes) that is allocated for the replication instance.

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether minor engine upgrades are applied automatically to the replication instance during the maintenance window.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the replication instance is located.

engine_version.description: The engine version number of the replication instance.

id.description: The identifier for the replication instance.

kms_key_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the KMS encryption key used to encrypt the replication instance.

multi_az.description: Specifies if the replication instance is a Multi-AZ deployment.

network_type.description: The type of network used by the replication instance (e.g., VPC).

preferred_maintenance_window.description: The weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, in UTC.

publicly_accessible.description: Indicates if the replication instance is publicly accessible.

replication_instance_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the replication instance.

replication_instance_class.description: The compute and memory capacity of the replication instance as specified by the instance class.

replication_instance_private_ips.description: A list of private IP addresses assigned to the replication instance.

replication_instance_public_ips.description: A list of public IP addresses assigned to the replication instance.

replication_subnet_group_id.description: The identifier of the subnet group associated with the replication instance.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the replication instance.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A set of VPC security group IDs associated with the replication instance.
